items.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.

items.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
items.description: Alfred Wahlforss was running out of options. His startup, Listen Labs, needed to hire over 100 engineers, but competing against Mark Zuckerberg s $100 million offers seemed impossible. So he spent $5,000 — a fifth of his marketing budget — on a billb

items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.description: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot, the company s workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification tool into what executives describe as a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data,

items.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required

items.title: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B is an open-source coding model landing right in the Claude Code moment

items.title: The creator of Claude Code just revealed his workflow, and developers are losing their minds

items.title: Toyota’s Woven Capital appoints new CIO and COO in push for finding the ‘future of mobility’
items.description: Woven Capital is the growth-stage venture capital arm of Toyota, focused on backing founders building in space, cybersecurity, and autonomous driving.

items.title: Anthropic is having a month
items.description: A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

items.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
items.description: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

items.title: Robotaxi companies refuse to say how often their AVs need remote help
items.description: Aurora, May Mobility, Motional, Nuro, Tesla, Waymo, and Zoox all refused to cough up a number during Senator Ed Markey's recent investigation.

items.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
items.description: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

items.title: It’s not your imagination: AI seed startups are commanding higher valuations
items.description: Among the most recent Y Combinator cohort, many startups were commanding $40 million valuations. But with more money comes higher expectations.

items.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
items.description: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

items.title: Meta was finally held accountable for harming teens. Now what?
items.description: Meta faces thousands more court cases while Congress has proposed numerous bills addressing children’s online safety, some heavily criticized.

items.title: Go play this secret game in your TikTok DMs
items.description: The game is available globally and can be accessed in both one-on-one DM chats and in group chats.

items.title: Caller ID app Truecaller hits 500 million monthly users
items.description: Truecaller now has more than 4 million paying users across the world.

items.title: Social gaming platform Rec Room, once valued at $3.5B, is shutting down
items.description: Rec Room, the social platform for user-generated games and virtual experiences, will shutter on June 1.

items.title: Alexa+ gets new food ordering experiences with Uber Eats and Grubhub
items.description: You can now order from Uber Eats and Grubhub using Alexa+, an experience Amazon says will be similar to chatting with a waiter at a restaurant or placing an order at a drive-thru.

items.title: Whoop’s valuation just tripled to $10 billion
items.description: The fitness tracking startup just closed a $575 million Series G with Cristiano Ronaldo and LeBron James among its investors. The obvious question looming over a round of this size at this valuation: Is an IPO coming?

items.title: Uber and WeRide ramp up robotaxi operations in Dubai
items.description: Uber and WeRide have launched robotaxi operations without a human safety operator in Dubai as part of a broader expansion in the Middle East.

items.title: North Korean hackers blamed for hijacking popular Axios open source project to spread malware
items.description: A hacker inserted malware in Axios, an open source web tool downloaded tens of millions of times weekly, in a widespread hack.
